mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date, imp_uid, merchant_uid ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{finalAmount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW(), #{imp_uid}, #{merchant_uid} )
INSERT INTO payment ( user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date, imp_uid, merchant_uid ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW(), #{impUid}, #{merchantUid} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, pp.pass_no, pp.item_name FROM payment p INNER JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}

SELECT p.pay_no AS payNo, p.pay_status AS payStatus, p.imp_uid AS impUid, p.user_id AS userId, pp.pass_no AS passNo, pr.review_cnt AS reviewCnt, w.remaining_count AS remainingCount FROM payment p JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no JOIN pass_product pr ON pp.pass_no = pr.pass_no JOIN user_pass_wallet w ON p.user_id = w.user_id WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_pass_wallet w JOIN payment p ON w.user_id = p.user_id JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no JOIN pass_product pr ON pp.pass_no = pr.pass_no SET w.remaining_count = w.remaining_count - pr.review_cnt WHERE p.pay_no = #{payNo}
UPDATE user_coupon SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND expired_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT U.coupon_code AS couponCode, C.coupon_name AS couponName, C.discount_rate AS discountRate, U.issued_at AS issuedAt, U.expired_at AS expiredAt, U.status AS status, DATEDIFF(U.expired_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS dday FROM user_coupon U JOIN coupon C ON U.coupon_code = C.coupon_code WHERE U.user_id = #{userId} AND C.coupon_type = 'COUPON' AND U.coupon_code = #{couponCode} AND U.status = 'UNUSED' AND U.expired_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY U.expired_at ASC

SELECT pr.pay_no AS payNo, pr.user_id AS userId, pr.amount AS amount, pr.pay_status AS payStatus, pr.pay_date AS payDate, r.res_no AS resNo, r.res_date AS resDate, r.res_time AS resTime, r.use_date AS useDate, r.use_time AS useTime, r.res_status AS resStatus, pr.imp_uid AS impUid, pr.user_id AS userId, DATEDIFF(r.use_date, NOW()) AS dday FROM payment_reservation pr JOIN reservation r ON pr.res_no = r.res_no WHERE pr.pay_no = #{payNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET res_status = 'CANCEL' WHERE pay_no = #{payNo}
UPDATE payment_reservation SET pay_status = 'CANCEL', refund = 1, refund_date = NOW() WHERE pay_no = #{payNo}
